{{Infobox religious building
| name = Hiyausuno Shrine
| native_name = 兵主神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15

{{nihongo|'''Hiyausuno Shrine'''|兵主神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}
* {{ill|Q135195551|ltq=Q135195551|qid=Q135195551|1=Hyōzu shrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11381626|ltq=Q11381626|qid=Q11381626|1=List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province}}
** Series ordinal: 4
** P155: {{ill|Tokano- Shrine|lt=Tokano- Shrine|qid=Q135040606|1=Tokano- Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q135040608|ltq=Q135040608|qid=Q135040608|1=Akafuchino Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q1053727|ltq=Q1053727|qid=Q1053727|1=Tajima Province}}
* {{ill|Asago District, Hyōgo|lt=Asago district|ceb|Asako-gun|en|Asago District, Hyōgo|fa|شهرستان آساگو، هیوگو|ja|朝来郡|zh|朝來郡|qid=Q4803324|1=Asago District, Hyōgo}}
